task_completion.description: Log into the OpenSIS application as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard or portal is visible, indicating a successful login using the provided admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Staff search or Staff list page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Staff', 'Users', or 'Staff Search' page is open within the OpenSIS interface.

task_completion.description: Search for the inactive staff member 'James Helper'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Search parameters are visible showing a query for 'James' or 'Helper', and/or a checkbox/filter to 'Include Inactive' staff is selected.

task_completion.description: Open the existing staff record for James Helper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The staff profile, demographic, or edit page specifically for 'James Helper' is displayed.

task_completion.description: Reactivate the staff account's OpenSIS access.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'OpenSIS Access' field (checkbox, toggle, or dropdown) is being changed to enabled, checked, or 'Y'/'Yes'.
A save button is clicked and/or a success message is displayed indicating the staff record was successfully updated.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to reactivate the account.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the OpenSIS web interface in a browser. There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL commands or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing account rather than creating a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent clicking 'Add a New Staff Member' or filling out a completely blank staff creation form. The agent must be editing an existing record.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the actual OpenSIS application URL and interface, not a text editor, mock HTML file, or copied text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Staff Member: First Name 'James', Last Name 'Helper', Username 'jhelper'. The account is initially inactive (OpenSIS access = 'N'). The agent must locate this specific existing record and change the OpenSIS access status to 'Y' (Yes/Enabled). The agent must NOT create a new staff record.
